rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Remote WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers Activity
id: 9599c180-e3a8-4743-8f92-7fb96d3be648
status: test
description: 'Detect potential adversaries leveraging WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers
  remotely to move laterally in a network.

  This event is best correlated and used as an enrichment to determine the potential
  lateral movement activity.

  '
references:
- https://threathunterplaybook.com/hunts/windows/200902-RemoteWMIActiveScriptEventConsumers/notebook.html
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
date: 2020-09-02
modified: 2024-09-02
tags:
- attack.lateral-movement
- attack.privilege-escalation
- detection.threat-hunting
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1546.003
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4624
    LogonType: 3
    ProcessName|endswith: scrcons.exe
  filter_main_local_system:
    TargetLogonId: '0x3e7'
  condition: selection and not 1 of filter_main_*
falsepositives:
- SCCM
level: medium
